transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline for all three components, then focus first on the most likely bottleneck component to unlock the largest headroom gain. Use one subtask to inspect the portfolio structure, identify which component is most constrained by its class-specific answer contract, and produce a single improved feasible candidate for that component. If that candidate looks strong, allocate the remaining effort to the next-highest-value component; otherwise, pivot to the component with the clearest path to improvement. Keep the goal strictly on feasible gains rather than risky over-optimization.
